name: Interval - Maximum Tune
description:
RPG set in Tokyo based off Wangan Midnight and highway street racing. Possible plans for a TXR based expansion are being considered (I should've done this when I made the bot.)

For all my Wangan bros, gals and enbies! I couldn't find a good RPG bot for this so I originally modified my Initial D one for this sake. Tackle the Shuto Expressway and live out your story.

Publish your chats and leave reviews please! I'd love to see what people are doing with my bots!

You might run into some funky LLM issues, still working out the kinks!

UPDATE 10/29/24:

Redid the definition (full overhaul, includes a list of Shuto Expressway routes, and a way better definition overall) and starting message, trying something new this time based on some personal RPG bots I've done.
creator: TCR354
